chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D – 5171 of 2021 Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 28.09.2021 Petitioner present in person Mr. Muhammad Nishat Warsi, DAG. ----------------------------------- Admittedly, the petitioner filed C.P. No.428-K/2019 before the apex Court, which was dismissed vide order dated 29.8.2019. It would be conducive to refer that order, which is that: - “This petition is barred by 1624 days. The application for condonation has been filed by the petitioner wherein he has stated that time was spent in his communication with the respondent and also on account of sickness of his mother. He has not attached any document to show that he has been in contact with the department except that he has mentioned a phone number in his application and he has also not attached any document supporting the fact that his mother was actually sick. No sufficient reason has been assigned in the application for condonation of delay nor each day’s delay has been explained. The application for condonation of delay merits no consideration. The same is, therefore, dismissed. Consequently, the petition is dismissed being time barred. The petitioner, if he has any other subsisting grievance against the respondent may avail remedy in accordance with law.” In view of above, this Court has no jurisdiction to examine the issue, which has already attained its finality. Petition dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
